articles.title: 🎉 Welcome to PromoHub — Your Free Auto-Deal Finder!
articles.summary: This is your first post! The site is now live and the automation is working. Every 4 hours, this site will automatically pull the best deals, product launches, and discoveries from across the web. Bookmark this page and check back often for fresh picks!

articles.title: ⚙️ How This Site Runs 100% Free Forever
articles.summary: This entire website costs $0/month to operate. GitHub Actions fetches RSS feeds every 4 hours, generates static HTML pages, and commits them back. GitHub Pages serves the files for free. No servers, no databases, no hosting fees. Just clever use of free tools!

articles.title: 🛠️ Top 5 Free Tools Every Creator Needs in 2026
articles.summary: Discover the best free tools for content creators, developers, and marketers. From image editors to AI writers, automation platforms to analytics dashboards — all completely free. Updated regularly as new tools launch and old favorites get even better.
